
# Assignment Submission

## Submission Checklist

* [ ] I forked the repository
* [ ] I cloned my fork using SSH
* [ ] I created a dedicated branch for my submission
* [ ] I did not work directly on `main`
* [ ] I created my submission folder
* [ ] I completed `passport.md`
* [ ] I included `terminal-transcript.txt`
* [ ] I included `git-history.md`
* [ ] I did not modify assignment files

Anything else you would like the reviewer to know.
